mechanism_narrative: A positive 3-month trend in RSAFS signals strengthening household demand and near-term revenue momentum for listed firms, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the RSAFS 3-month trend has nonpositive Rank IC for 20-day S&P 500 returns over two consecutive 3-year walk-forward windows.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS crosses above 1.00%, the market prices a transition away from emergency-rate conditions, raising discount rates and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of walk-forward cases or a mean return not below baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A low UNRATE combined with a rising FEDFUNDS rate signals late-cycle labor tightness and policy tightening pressure, compressing equity multiples and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE below 4.5% and FEDFUNDS rises over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:latest UNRATE value is 4.4 and FEDFUNDS value is 1.04
regime_hint: late-cycle expansion with tightening monetary policy
failure_condition: Reject if the joint low-UNRATE and rising-FEDFUNDS signal does not underperform unconditional 60-day S&P 500 returns by at least 50 bps on average.

mechanism_narrative: A rising INDPRO trend signals improving real output and operating leverage in cyclical sectors, increasing expected earnings and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if positive INDPRO trend observations have lower average 20-day S&P 500 returns than negative trend observations in two consecutive walk-forward samples.

mechanism_narrative: When HOUST crosses materially below its prior-year average, residential investment weakness signals slower durable demand and credit sensitivity, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses 10% below its 12-month moving average
failure_condition: Reject if triggered HOUST weakness is followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of triggered walk-forward observations.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating CPIAUCSL while FEDFUNDS remains low signals inflation pressure not yet offset by policy rates, lifting expected tightening risk and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized growth exceeds 4% while FEDFUNDS is below 2%
evidence_refs: fact:latest CPIAUCSL value is 243.79 and FEDFUNDS value is 1.04
failure_condition: Reject if the interaction signal has a nonnegative average 5-day S&P 500 return or negative-return hit rate below 52% in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Rising PAYEMS with a stable or falling UNRATE signals broad income growth without visible labor-market deterioration, supporting consumption and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS rises over 3 months and UNRATE does not rise over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:latest PAYEMS value is 146404.0 and UNRATE value is 4.4
failure_condition: Reject if PAYEMS-up and UNRATE-stable signals do not produce higher 20-day S&P 500 returns than PAYEMS-up alone in walk-forward comparison.

mechanism_narrative: When GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter growth crosses below zero, the signal identifies a contraction in real aggregate demand, reducing expected earnings and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if negative GDPC1 growth triggers are followed by 60-day S&P 500 returns above the unconditional median in more than half of triggered cases.
